summary: Completed Phase 3 testing of Wastage Tracking v4.0 features. All backend APIs working correctly (15/15 tests passed). Fixed 2 backend bugs: generate_batch_number() function and missing PUT/DELETE endpoints for market-rates. UI features tested: Market Rates CRUD, Wastage Dashboard, Procurement wastage dialog, Pre-processing threshold status column, Production threshold status column.

fixed_by_tester.issue: generate_batch_number() returning None - function body was orphaned
fixed_by_tester.fix: Restored function body inside the function

issues: Missing DialogContent aria-describedby (console warning only, LOW priority)

market_rates_crud.create: ✅ POST /api/market-rates - creates rate with species, product_form, rate_per_kg_inr/usd, effective_from
market_rates_crud.read: ✅ GET /api/market-rates - returns list, GET /api/market-rates/active - returns active rates only
market_rates_crud.ui: ✅ Market Rates page shows table with Edit/Delete buttons, dialogs work correctly

procurement_wastage_dialog.description: View Wastage button (Package icon) opens dialog showing stage-wise breakdown with Input/Output/Wastage/Yield%/Status/Revenue Loss

lot_waterfall_view.api: ✅ GET /api/wastage/lot-waterfall/{lot_id} - returns complete waterfall with stages
lot_waterfall_view.frontend: ✅ LotWaterfall.js renders visual waterfall with all stages

preprocessing_threshold_column.description: Pre-processing page shows 'Threshold Status' column with yield badges (green/amber/red)

production_threshold_column.description: Production page shows 'Threshold Status' column with yield badges

wastage_dashboard.stats_cards: ✅ Today's Wastage, Month Revenue Loss, Active RED Alerts, Byproduct Revenue

sidebar_navigation.description: Market Rates link visible in sidebar for admin role under wastage section

critical_code_review_comments: Server.py is 2600+ lines - consider splitting into route modules for maintainability
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed generate_batch_number() and added PUT/DELETE market-rates endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All wastage v4.0 features are working. Backend had 2 bugs that were fixed: generate_batch_number() function body was orphaned, and PUT/DELETE endpoints for market-rates were missing. Comprehensive backend test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_wastage_features.py - run with pytest. Market rates CRUD, wastage dashboard, lot waterfall, and threshold status columns all verified working.

mocked_apis_list: /api/live-prices - still serving mocked data as per original implementation
